35 #ifndef ROSCPP_ROSOUT_APPENDER_H
36 #define ROSCPP_ROSOUT_APPENDER_H
37 
38 #include <ros/message_forward.h>
39 #include "common.h"
40 
41 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
42 #include <boost/thread/condition_variable.hpp>
43 #include <boost/weak_ptr.hpp>
44 
45 #include <boost/thread.hpp>
46 
47 namespace rosgraph_msgs
48 {
49 ROS_DECLARE_MESSAGE(Log);
50 }
51 
52 namespace ros
53 {
54 
55 class Publication;
56 typedef boost::shared_ptr<Publication> PublicationPtr;
57 typedef boost::weak_ptr<Publication> PublicationWPtr;
58 
59 class ROSCPP_DECL ROSOutAppender : public ros::console::LogAppender
60 {
61 public:
62  ROSOutAppender();
63  ~ROSOutAppender();
64 
65  const std::string& getLastError() const;
66 
67  virtual void log(::ros::console::Level level, const char* str, const char* file, const char* function, int line);
68 
69 protected:
70  void logThread();
71 
72  std::string last_error_;
73 
74  typedef std::vector<rosgraph_msgs::LogPtr> V_Log;
75  V_Log log_queue_;
76  boost::mutex queue_mutex_;
77  boost::condition_variable queue_condition_;
78  bool shutting_down_;
79  bool disable_topics_;
80 
81  boost::thread publish_thread_;
82 };
83 
84 } // namespace ros
85 
86 #endif
